archetype_description: Warm, sophisticated, trustworthy. A blend of Earthy/Organic for safety and approachability, with Luxury elements for the Premium matchmaking feel.

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed bottom bar, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80), 1px top border (border-border/50), padded for mobile safe areas.
bottom_navigation.active_state: Primary color icon with small dot indicator below. Font weight medium.

candidate_card.layout: Vertical stack. Image container top, info bottom.
candidate_card.photo_treatment: DEFAULT BLURRED: Apply `filter blur-2xl` and `scale-110` (to avoid blurred edges) to the image. Overlay with a dark gradient `bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent`.
candidate_card.unlock_overlay: Center a glassmorphism button 'Unlock Photo' (`backdrop-blur-md bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/30`) over the blurred photo.
candidate_card.match_score: Positioned top-left or top-right over the image. Pill shape, `bg-secondary text-white`, showing percentage.
candidate_card.info_section: White background, padded (p-4). Large name, age, region. Badges inline with name.

buttons.primary: rounded-2xl bg-primary text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: rounded-2xl bg-secondary text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform
buttons.premium: rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#B5952F] text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 shadow-premium
buttons.outline: rounded-2xl border border-border text-primary font-medium py-3 px-6 hover:bg-black/5

badges.verified: Pill shape, tiny text, bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border border-blue-100. Icon: Check-circle.
badges.financial: Pill shape, tiny text, bg-premium-gold_light text-yellow-800 border border-premium-gold/30. Icon: Diamond 💎.
badges.selfie: Pill shape, tiny text, bg-secondary/10 text-secondary border border-secondary/20.

completeness_bar.style: Thin rounded track (`bg-border`), filled with primary color. If 100%, fill with gold.
completeness_bar.text: Small text above showing 'Profile Completeness' and percentage aligned right.

premium_tiers.premium_card: Border 1px solid #D4AF37, background white, subtle gold shadow. Gold text for features.
premium_tiers.vip_card: Background dark (vip_dark), text white. Border 1px solid white/10. Gold accents for buttons and icons.

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle y-axis translation (`-translate-y-1`) on cards and buttons.
micro_interactions.blur_reveal: When photo unlocked, transition blur to 0 over 1.5s with a slight scale down (`scale-110` to `scale-100`) for a dramatic, premium reveal.
micro_interactions.match_reasons: Staggered fade-up entry for list of reasons why users match.

images.description: Stylish woman in a hat enjoying a drink indoors. Used for blurred profile example.
Gold glitter texture. Use at low opacity for Premium/VIP section backgrounds.

media.icons: Use lucide-react for standard icons. Use native emojis (🌹 🎁 💎 👑) for gifts as specified in requirements.
